metadata.title: DataSync Pro — Real-time edge-to-cloud SQLite sync
metadata.description: Synchronize local SQLite databases from industrial machines and edge systems to the cloud with an event-driven outbox architecture. Built for reliability at scale.
metadata.ogTitle: DataSync Pro — Edge SQLite sync for industrial systems
metadata.ogDescription: Real-time data synchronization platform for machines, PLCs, and edge gateways.

hero.title: Sync industrial data in real time
hero.description: DataSync Pro streams changes from local SQLite at the edge to your cloud backend using a resilient outbox pattern—built for PLCs, gateways, and harsh factory floors.

features.title: Everything you need for dependable sync
features.subtitle: From dusty cabinets to your data lake—one pipeline, observable end to end.

items.title: Outbox-first delivery
items.description: Events are captured locally, ordered, and replayed safely when connectivity returns—no silent drops.

items.title: SQLite at the edge
items.description: Use the database your devices already run. Schema migrations and conflict hooks included.

items.title: Real-time streaming
items.description: Push change feeds upstream as they happen, with backpressure and batching you control.

items.title: Industrial-grade ops
items.description: Metrics, structured logs, and trace IDs across edge agents and cloud ingest.

items.title: Policy-driven routing
items.description: Filter, enrich, and route events before they leave the plant network.

items.title: Multi-tenant cloud
items.description: Isolate customers and environments while sharing a unified control plane.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Four steps from machine event to cloud truth.

steps.title: Capture
steps.description: Instrument your SQLite writers; changes land in a durable local outbox.

steps.title: Stage
steps.description: The edge agent batches, compresses, and signs payloads for transport.

steps.title: Sync
steps.description: HTTPS streams with retries and idempotent receipts—safe over flaky links.

steps.title: Project
steps.description: Cloud services materialize views, trigger workflows, and fan out to analytics.

useCases.title: Built for serious edge environments
useCases.subtitle: Teams use DataSync Pro when downtime is measured in dollars.

cases.title: Manufacturing lines
cases.description: MES and SCADA adjacent systems stay consistent with central production history.

cases.title: Energy & utilities
cases.description: Substations and field devices buffer telemetry until the backbone is stable.

cases.title: Transportation assets
cases.description: Rolling stock and depots sync maintenance logs without always-on connectivity.

cases.title: Smart buildings
cases.description: BMS edge controllers consolidate readings before hitting regional clouds.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Have questions? We'd love to hear from you.

success.title: Message Sent!
success.message: Thank you for contacting us. We'll get back to you soon.

testimonials.title: Loved by edge platform teams
testimonials.subtitle: What operators say after their first zero-loss week.

items.quote: We replaced a pile of cron jobs and brittle FTP drops. Outbox replay saved three plants during a carrier outage.
items.author: Elena Voss

items.quote: SQLite on the line, Postgres in the cloud—DataSync Pro made that split feel intentional instead of scary.
items.author: Marcus Chen

items.quote: Latency metrics finally match what our OT team sees on the floor. That trust was worth the migration.
items.author: Sofia Martins

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Quick answers about deployment, security, and scale.

items.a: Yes. The outbox persists locally until connectivity returns; sync resumes with ordering preserved.

items.q: How do you handle schema changes?
items.a: Edge agents support versioned migrations and coordinate with cloud projection jobs to avoid drift.
TLS in transit, optional envelope encryption for payloads, and KMS integration in cloud.

items.q: Can we self-host the cloud plane?
items.a: Enterprise tier supports dedicated clusters and VPC peering; talk to us about air-gapped options.

footer.tagline: Real-time sync for the industrial edge.
